title: Cobblemon Mastered
description: Cobblemon Mastered combines Cobblemon with addons like Mega Showdown, Legends Untold, Outbreaks & Riding, plus world mods like Terralith and Waystones, all optimized with Sodium & Iris Shaders for the ultimate Pokémon survival adventure.
body:
# About The Mod
Cobblemon Masterd is a loaded Pokémon x Minecraft modpack centered around Cobblemon (Cobbled Studios) and an extended addon ecosystem. Explore, fight, and adventure with a well-curated combination of gameplay, exploration, and performance mods—each meticulously handpicked to provide you with the smoothest and most immersive trainer experience possible.
# 2.0.0
 Removed Terralith Added Biomes O' Plenty [Forstride]
 
 MonkeyLib538[OffsetMonkey538]
 
 adventure-platform-mod[papermc]
 
 CobbleTowns: Continued [Cobblemon 1.6.1][JonathansPlayroom]
# 1.0.0
###  Credits
- Modpack Logo Inspiration:[BrettPostScript](https://www.deviantart.com/brettpostscript/art/Pokemon-Beast-Ball-976810881) 
- Cobblemon Core: Cobbled Studios  
- Addons: Various creators (see description)  



### Pokémon Adventure & Addons
Around which the pack centers is Cobblemon (Cobbled Studios), supplemented by:

Cobblemon Additions (strikebyte)

CobbleBuilds: Leaders (fyre520)

CobbleDollars (Harmex)

Cobbleloots: Loot Balls and More! (Ripio)

Cobblemon: Mega Showdown (YajatKaul)

Cobblemon Smartphone (NBP)

Cobblemon Box Link (not listed on Modrinth)

Cobblemon Capture XP, Counter, Spawn Notification & Unchained (tmetcalfe89)

Cobblemon: Legends Untold (TSFlareon)

Cobblemon Outbreaks (Hiroku)

Cobblemon Riding (islana)

From Mega Evolutions to legendary myths, outbreaks, gyms, smartphones, and Pokédollars, everything you need for a true Pokémon journey is here.

### World & Exploration

Terralith (Starmute) for stunning terrain.

JourneyMap (mysticdrew) for mapping.

Waystones (BlayTheNinth) for quick travel.

Loot Table Modifier (OffsetMonkey538) for well-balanced rewards.

Myths and Legends (oVinter) for additional adventure.

### ⚡ Performance & QoL

Core optimizations: Sodium (jellysquid3), Sodium Extra (FlashyReese), Iris Shaders (coderbot), Reese's Sodium Options (FlashyReese).

Menu/UI tools: FancyMenu (Keksuccino), Konkrete (Keksuccino), Melody (Keksuccino), Cloth Config API (shedaniel), Architectury API (shedaniel), YetAnotherConfigLib (isxander), Text Placeholder API (Patbox), Mod Menu (Prospector).

Additional utilities: Trinkets (Emi), PlayerEXP (clevernucleus), Custom LAN (DimiDimit), e4mc (vgskye), Resourcify (DeDiamondPro), Flight or Flight (rufiaorsomething).

Fabric essentials: Fabric API & Fabric Language Kotlin (modmuss50), Balm (BlayTheNinth).

### ✨ Why Cobblemon Masterd?
Unlike regular Cobblemon packs, this one is a complete built trainer's toolkit:
✔ Long Cobblemon gameplay with addons by the best creators
✔ A stunning, discoverable survival world
✔ Optimized graphics and fast performance
✔ A mix of fun, exploration, and competitive battling

Forge your path, challenge leaders, uncover myths, and become the ultimate Cobblemon Master! ????
